hero.title: Nodex
hero.subtitle: Cybersecurity club at Al-Khorezmi Specialized School. Enhance your knowledge, compete in CTF challenges, and build the future with us.

about.label: // About us
about.title: Why Nodex?
about.subtitle: Nodex is a hub for knowledge, experience, and competitions for students passionate about cybersecurity. We train the cyber defenders of the future.
about.feature1Desc: Free courses on cybersecurity fundamentals, network security, and ethical hacking.
about.feature2Desc: Real-world experience: penetration testing, forensics, and more.
about.feature3Desc: Participate in Capture The Flag competitions and test your skills.
about.feature4Desc: Masterclasses with industry experts and networking opportunities.
